benchmark: PHerc. Paris 4 tutorial segment w00_20231016151002, GP TimeSformer (timesformer_wild15_20230702185753_0_fr_i3depoch=12.ckpt)

data.labels: w00_20231016151002_inklabels.tif + supervision_mask.tif at level-0 canvas resolution
data.regions: 3 ink-rich + 3 low-ink control, 2048x2048 px each at level 0

preprocessing.note: reverse_depth is REQUIRED for this segment family (predecessor 20231016151000 is on the GP repo reverse list). Without it AUROC drops to ~0.43-0.53 (chance). Per-tile argmax depth centering also hurts vs the fixed window.
preprocessing.tile: 64x64, stride 32; pos = supervised + >=30% ink; neg = supervised + 0 ink

crack_firing.headline: 30.5% of no-ink tiles score >=0.5 but only 0.96% score >=0.9; high-confidence false firing is rare and concentrated (region r2: 3.0%)
crack_firing.suspects_montage: p4_crack_suspects_l0.jpg — top no-ink firings split into (a) horizontal layer-boundary/crack bands, (b) likely unlabeled ink strokes (label noise), (c) dark blotches
crack_firing.near_vs_far: firing rate modestly higher within 128px of labeled ink (label tolerance/dilation), e.g. r5: 0.279 near vs 0.185 far

render_pass: surface tracer (smoothed argmax + parabolic refine + median/gaussian depth regularization) on level-1 windows; overlays in r*_*.jpg
